message:
fix: update macOS runner from macos-13 to macos-15

The macos-13 runner images are retired. Update to macos-15 for
x86_64-apple-darwin builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@ jobs:
             artifact_name: cass
             asset_name: cass-linux-arm64
           # macOS Intel
-          - os: macos-13
+          - os: macos-15
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             artifact_name: cass
             asset_name: cass-darwin-amd64

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "coding-agent-search"
-version = "0.1.59"
+version = "0.1.60"
 edition = "2024"
 authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel"]
 description = "Unified TUI search over local coding agent histories"
